title: Unique Fluffy Argentinian Tortillas Quesadilla
description: A fresh and fluffy Argentinian dish featuring tortillas, perfect for midnight cravings, and is egg-free friendly. This recipe is a twist on traditional quesadillas with a sweet and tangy glaze.

ingredients.name: glaze
ingredients.notes: made from equal parts honey and apple cider vinegar

instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat and brush with olive oil.
In a bowl, mix together the shredded cheese, chimichurri sauce, and salsa criolla.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle a quarter of the cheese mixture onto half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also crispy and the cheese is melted.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and cheese mixture.
Brush the glaze over the quesadillas and serve immediately.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
